## Checklist
- [ ] Targets **`dev`** (not `master`)
- [ ] `manifest.json` version bumped if behaviour changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Translation strings added/updated if new UI text was added
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed
